allow: Bash(curl -s "https://api.bgm.tv/v0/subjects/443106" -H "User-Agent: anime-tracker/1.0" | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(data.get\('tags', []\)[:10], indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\); print\('platform:', data.get\('platform'\)\); print\('date:', data.get\('date'\)\)")
